testCases.name: happy path - API call completes and process ends
testCases.description: Starts the process, mocks the HTTP connector response with a sample cat fact, and asserts the process completes.

_integrationTestNotes: Integration tests should verify: (1) make-request (HTTP connector, io.camunda:http-json:1) sends a real GET request to the configured URL (e.g. https://catfact.ninja/fact) and receives a valid JSON response; (2) the response body is accessible via the 'body' variable after the connector completes; (3) confirm no authentication errors or network timeouts occur in the target environment.
